/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -flto -o _rhubarb.cpython-312-darwin.so CMakeFiles/_rhubarb.dir/src/python/bindings.cpp.o  librhubarb-lib.a librhubarb-exporters.a librhubarb-recognition.a libflite.a libpocketSphinx.a libsphinxbase.a ../_deps/whisper-build/src/libwhisper.a ../_deps/whisper-build/ggml/src/libggml.a ../_deps/whisper-build/ggml/src/libggml-cpu.a ../_deps/whisper-build/ggml/src/ggml-blas/libggml-blas.a ../_deps/whisper-build/ggml/src/libggml-base.a -lm -framework Accelerate librhubarb-audio.a libwebRtc.a libvorbis.a libogg.a librhubarb-animation.a librhubarb-core.a librhubarb-time.a librhubarb-logging.a librhubarb-tools.a libwhereami.a libutfcpp.a libutf8proc.a libcppFormat.a
